name: Cheese Crunchers
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Prepare a 9 x 13-inch pan with cooking spray; set aside.
In a double boiler, add chocolate chips, butterscotch chips, and margarine.
Heat until melted and smooth. Stir in graham cracker crumbs until mixture forms coarse crumbs. Reserve 1 cup of crumb mixture for topping. Press the remainder into the prepared pan. Bake for 12 minutes. Meanwhile, to prepare the filling, combine cream cheese, sugar, egg whites, flour, and lemon juice.
Pour evenly over baked crust. Sprinkle with reserved crumb mixture. Bake for an additional 25 minutes.
